name: GEMM via cuBLAS/cuBLASLt (CUDA)
trigger: Standard dense GEMM, especially large matrices (>1024) where cuBLAS is near-optimal
approach: For standard GEMM, calling cuBLASLt directly with pre-cached descriptors and algo heuristic search eliminates PyTorch dispatch overhead. For non-standard GEMM (batched, strided, fused epilogue), use CUTLASS CuTe templates. Focus on epilogue fusion (bias add, activation) into the GEMM output loop to avoid extra memory passes.
